title: Datastore
description: Configuration for an analytics data store.

displayName.description: Required. Display name for the data store.

self.description: Output only. Resource URI of the data store.

org.description: Output only. Organization associated with the data store.

targetType.description: Required. Type of target for data export.

datastoreConfig.description: Configuration for the data store target.

createTime.description: Output only. Time the data store was created.

lastUpdateTime.description: Output only. Time the data store was last updated.
